title: senecio picridis
intro: Senecio picridis, also known as stinking morell, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Senecio picridis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing swelling and pain in the body. Senecio picridis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in traditional remedies for skin issues and wounds.
